source_name: State fuel and resource contribution profiles
notes: Manual state/territory profile scaffold compiled only from loaded official-source envelopes and methodology notes. It is qualitative context plus links to verified production and royalty envelopes; it does not allocate Commonwealth tax by state.
source_rights: Project metadata/prose CC BY 4.0; upstream source rights remain with DCCEEW, Geoscience Australia, WA Government, Queensland Government and Commonwealth Budget sources.
citation: Fuel Resilience AU state contribution methodology; DCCEEW Australian Energy Statistics 2025; Geoscience Australia AECR 2025; WA and Queensland budget/royalty sources.

fields.method: State roles are descriptive and anchored to loaded official production, royalty and policy envelopes. Federal tax allocation remains unavailable unless a source publishes state-attributable Commonwealth receipts.

states.primary_role: North-west oil, condensate, conventional gas and LNG export hub.
states.production_role: Largest loaded state/territory oil and gas production role in the AES state rows.
states.refining_role: No loaded refinery count is published on this page.
states.import_role: Major export and import/storage infrastructure context; terminal capacity is not loaded.
infrastructure_summary: North West Shelf conventional gas and liquid hydrocarbon context
Northern Carnarvon, Browse and Bonaparte basin context in AECR
WA petroleum state component royalty and North West Shelf grant receipt line loaded
states.federal_tax_note: Loaded Commonwealth resource-rent and PRRT policy envelopes are national/project concepts, not WA-attributed receipt rows.
states.notes: Strongest loaded state coverage because production and WA petroleum/NWS receipt context are both present.

states.primary_role: Coal seam gas and LNG-linked petroleum royalty state.
states.production_role: Large coal seam gas production role in the AES state rows.
states.refining_role: Lytton refinery role is noted as infrastructure context only; no refinery throughput is attributed here.
states.import_role: Port and LNG export infrastructure context; terminal capacity is not loaded.
infrastructure_summary: Bowen and Surat coal seam gas context
Queensland petroleum royalty receipt row loaded
Queensland petroleum royalty source notes include gas converted into LNG
states.federal_tax_note: Loaded Commonwealth tax sources do not split PRRT, company tax or excise receipts by Queensland production.
states.notes: Strong loaded coverage for gas production and petroleum royalty receipts; federal revenue attribution remains unavailable.

states.primary_role: Gippsland/Bass Strait oil and gas production plus refining infrastructure.
states.production_role: Conventional gas, crude/condensate and naturally occurring LPG are present in AES state rows.
states.refining_role: Geelong refinery role is infrastructure context only; no refinery throughput is attributed here.
states.import_role: Import/storage role likely material but no terminal-capacity envelope is loaded.
infrastructure_summary: Gippsland basin appears in AECR oil basin context
AES state production rows are loaded
No petroleum-specific Victorian royalty receipt envelope is loaded

federal_revenue_boundary.reason: Loaded Commonwealth sources do not provide defensible state-level allocation. Allocating by production, company address, project location or consumption would be a model, not an observed public receipt.

not_captured: state-by-state fuel excise or GST attribution
raw site counts without an official definition
